<!-- ⚠️ Do Not Delete This! refactoring_template ⚠️ -->

**What code area needs refactoring?** (file paths or module names)

**What's the problem?** (duplication, complexity, dead code, poor naming, etc.)

**Proposed approach:**

**Why now?** (blocking other work, causing bugs, hard to maintain, etc.)

**Risks / requires careful testing:**
- [ ] This touches core editor rendering
- [ ] This touches a hot path
- [ ] This changes public API surface

**Would this benefit from moving to Rust?**
- [ ] Yes — describe why
- [ ] No
